name: Foundations
description: Build the core professional, technical, organizational, and self-management skills needed to work effectively, communicate clearly, manage information, and demonstrate impact in a modern workplace.
learningObjectives: Communicate professional purpose and motivation in writing, digitally, quickly, clearly, and effectively using assistive tools
Understand what technology is commonly used to accomplish the job you want to do, and resources you will need to learn to use it.
Organize and manage work information and documents in accordance with employer protocol
Motivate yourself and prioritize time to get the most important things done effectively without becoming overwhelmed or too distracted
Measure and articulate the impact of projects toward a goal and track that metric over time
Understand how online presence impacts the ability to realize career and life goals in both positive and negative ways

name: AI Leadership
description: Develop foundational understanding and practical leadership skills for using generative and agentic AI tools effectively, creatively, and ethically in professional settings.
learningObjectives: Understand the basic math and science concepts that make generative and agentic AI tools work
Use AI on appropriate tasks to do better work in less time with fewer resources
Use AI to generate multiple ideas and improve upon the best
Efficiently use and improve AI to learn new skills and integrate new tools as technology trend cycles evolve
Understand major issues in AI ethics and take a clear stand on a personal approach to AI ethics
